title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.180 - Special terms
text:
49.180.  Special terms. — The presiding commissioner or any two commissioners of the county commission may order a special term whenever the business and interest of the county require it.
(RSMo 1939 § 2487, A.L. 1959 S.B. 65, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2085; 1919 § 2581; 1909 § 4088 
Effective 1-01-85
